router.description: Classifies user questions and decides what research is needed before answering

planner.description: Decomposes complex questions and delegates to specialist agents

researcher.description: Investigates questions using tools and produces research reports

build_agent.description: Composes PoE builds from guides, meta data, and mechanics knowledge

fact_checker.description: Verifies research accuracy — catches gem confusion, outdated info, contradictions

answerer.description: Formats research into clear, well-cited responses for the player

tools.get_currency_prices: Currency exchange rates from poe.ninja (supports include_trends)
tools.get_build_meta: Build meta statistics from poe.ninja (ascendancies, skills, uniques)
tools.poe_web_search: Search the web for PoE information
tools.query_game_data: Query the PoE knowledge base (currencies, ascendancies, game mechanics, gems, unique items, passives tree, patch notes) — supports multi-query
